form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (25.04) when second at Sale in a Grade 5. Has never missed the placings from four starts off this box. Expected to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (25.04) when second at Sale in a Grade 5. Has never missed the placings from four starts off this box. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Nearing another win after her success on November 21 at this track over 300m. Last start was second over 300m in 16.98, behind My Boy Sonny. Yet to be beaten in two starts out of this box. Sure to go well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Nearing another win after her success on November 21 at this track over 300m. Last start was second over 300m in 16.98, behind My Boy Sonny. Yet to be beaten in two starts out of this box. Sure to go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Faltered and lost ground from 150m mark onwards.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings at final run of last campaign, finishing seventh (17.36) at this track before going for a nine weeks spell. Fresh up record includes two wins. Looks one of the hopes in the race.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings at final run of last campaign, finishing seventh (17.36) at this track before going for a nine weeks spell. Fresh up record includes two wins. Looks one of the hopes in the race.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (16.91) at this track over 300m. In the money last time and looks well placed to go one better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (16.91) at this track over 300m. In the money last time and looks well placed to go one better.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth over 435m at Sale, beaten 9 lengths (25.06) behind Dr. Cougar in a Grade 5 on April 1. Hard to tip with any confidence.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished sixth over 435m at Sale, beaten 9 lengths (25.06) behind Dr. Cougar in a Grade 5 on April 1. Hard to tip with any confidence.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (22.66) over 390m at Shepparton. Has ability and should run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third last start (22.66) over 390m at Shepparton. Has ability and should run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.15) when fourth over 300m at this track in a Grade 5. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and four minors. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (17.15) when fourth over 300m at this track in a Grade 5. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and four minors. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 410m at Horsham. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 410m at Horsham. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on turn off back straight.

form.formComment: Has finished eighth at the last two runs, both at Warragul, the latest when beaten 11 lengths behind Special Players over 400m. Happy enough to avoid.

formComments.title: TAB
